name: Orange Oven-Roasted Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 6 large potatoes, pare and cube 1 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, toss together the cubed potatoes, olive oil, orange peel, and paprika.
3. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Place the mixture in a 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
5. Bake for about 30 minutes, then stir thoroughly.
6. Continue baking until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown, about 45 more minutes.
7. Serve immediately.
Yield: 4-6 servings
